title: prunella × gentianifolia
intro: Prunella × gentianifolia, also known as hybrid self-heal, is a hybrid species of the Prunella genus, native to Europe and Asia, and is often cultivated for its medicinal and ornamental values. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Prunella × gentianifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system, while its medicinal properties also make it useful in treating sore throats, mouth ulcers, and gum infections. Prunella × gentianifolia can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected areas.
